presets.name: Alfornada Gym
presets.description: Bulbapedia-imported trainer roster for this battle in offline archive form.
howToBeat: Keep a stable answer for florges, which functions as the likely closer in this roster.
Bring pressure that does not fold to the team's psychic and fairy core.
